response.justification: Candidate has ~15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with demonstrated fullstack capability across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages (Java, DLang, C++). Recent role explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, workshops, custom test runner) aligns well with the Vitest/testing expectations. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin specifically, and no explicit PostgreSQL or major cloud platform depth shown beyond AWS CDK mention, but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Direct, current experience with AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong fullstack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Deep testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, custom test tooling, public workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or large-scale cloud platform work (AWS CDK noted, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth detailed)
